projects.name: LMCache
projects.description: LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

llmSummary.oneLiner: LMCache is a vendor-neutral KV cache management layer that turns transient KV cache into persistent, reusable AI-native knowledge for scalable LLM inference.
llmSummary.problemSolved: LLM inference is bottlenecked by repeated prefill computation and GPU memory limits, especially for long-context, multi-turn, and RAG workloads. LMCache solves this by enabling persistent, tiered KV cache offloading and reuse across requests, sessions, and engines, reducing TTFT and improving throughput.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 8,941 stars and a 24-hour delta of +275, LMCache is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The project has recent releases, active commits, and a growing ecosystem (NVIDIA Dynamo integration, PyTorch Foundation membership, AMD support), making it a hot topic in LLM inference optimization.
llmSummary.whatChanged: Recent updates include a new multiprocess architecture (April 2026) that boosts MoE inference performance by 10x, agentic workload benchmarks on AMD MI300X (May 2026), and multi-node P2P CPU memory sharing reaching production (January 2026). These releases and benchmarks likely drove the sustained interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: LMCache addresses a critical pain point in LLM inference—memory and latency—with a practical, vendor-neutral solution. Its integration with major frameworks (vLLM, NVIDIA Dynamo) and hardware (AMD, NVIDIA) makes it broadly applicable. The project's active community, frequent updates, and clear documentation lower the barrier for adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: LMCache is becoming the de facto standard for KV cache management. Developers building LLM serving systems should evaluate it to reduce costs and latency, especially for long-context and agentic workloads. Its pluggable architecture allows easy integration with existing stacks.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward persistent, tiered caching as a core infrastructure layer for LLM inference, similar to how Redis became essential for web apps. Developers should expect KV cache management to become a standard component in production LLM deployments.
llmSummary.targetUsers: LLM inference engineers, platform teams deploying large-scale LLM services, researchers working on KV cache optimization, and developers building RAG or multi-turn conversational AI systems.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still evolving (309 open issues). Integration with proprietary engines may require custom work. The reliance on community-driven partnerships means support for some backends may lag. Performance gains depend on workload patterns (e.g., prefix sharing).

hotProjects.name: LMCache
hotProjects.description: LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

llmSummary.oneLiner: LMCache is a vendor-neutral KV cache management layer that turns transient KV cache into persistent, reusable AI-native knowledge for scalable LLM inference.
llmSummary.problemSolved: LLM inference is bottlenecked by repeated prefill computation and GPU memory limits, especially for long-context, multi-turn, and RAG workloads. LMCache solves this by enabling persistent, tiered KV cache offloading and reuse across requests, sessions, and engines, reducing TTFT and improving throughput.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 8,941 stars and a 24-hour delta of +275, LMCache is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The project has recent releases, active commits, and a growing ecosystem (NVIDIA Dynamo integration, PyTorch Foundation membership, AMD support), making it a hot topic in LLM inference optimization.
llmSummary.whatChanged: Recent updates include a new multiprocess architecture (April 2026) that boosts MoE inference performance by 10x, agentic workload benchmarks on AMD MI300X (May 2026), and multi-node P2P CPU memory sharing reaching production (January 2026). These releases and benchmarks likely drove the sustained interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: LMCache addresses a critical pain point in LLM inference—memory and latency—with a practical, vendor-neutral solution. Its integration with major frameworks (vLLM, NVIDIA Dynamo) and hardware (AMD, NVIDIA) makes it broadly applicable. The project's active community, frequent updates, and clear documentation lower the barrier for adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: LMCache is becoming the de facto standard for KV cache management. Developers building LLM serving systems should evaluate it to reduce costs and latency, especially for long-context and agentic workloads. Its pluggable architecture allows easy integration with existing stacks.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward persistent, tiered caching as a core infrastructure layer for LLM inference, similar to how Redis became essential for web apps. Developers should expect KV cache management to become a standard component in production LLM deployments.
llmSummary.targetUsers: LLM inference engineers, platform teams deploying large-scale LLM services, researchers working on KV cache optimization, and developers building RAG or multi-turn conversational AI systems.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still evolving (309 open issues). Integration with proprietary engines may require custom work. The reliance on community-driven partnerships means support for some backends may lag. Performance gains depend on workload patterns (e.g., prefix sharing).

aihotHighlights.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
aihotHighlights.summary: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。

raw.titleEn: 今天凌晨五点的时候，我让 AI 帮我打磨一段文案，打磨三遍给我看。 AI 改完之后，我发现一遍比一遍讲究，但是一遍比一遍缺人味儿。 我已经用上最贵的 Claude Fable 5 了，还这样，让我很生…

items.title: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI合作辞职
items.description: 谷歌Android平台安全负责人René Mayrhofer辞职，他在5月18日内部告别信中指责公司"丧失道德指针"，批评谷歌悄悄放弃碳中和目标（因AI模型能耗），并与美国战争部签署允许AI用于"任何合法目的"的协议。今年4月下旬谷歌宣布向五角大楼提供AI用于机密工作，2025年2月更新AI原则时移除了不使用AI开发武器或监控工具的承诺。Mayrhofer担忧谷歌AI产品可能被用于针对公民的大规模监控，包括自己和家人。

trendEntities.summary: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

llmSummary.whatItIs: Headroom is an open-source tool that compresses tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before sending them to an LLM, reducing token usage by 60-95% while preserving answer quality. It offers a library, proxy, and MCP server.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo gained over 11,900 stars in 24 hours, indicating strong developer interest in cost-efficient LLM usage. This aligns with growing concerns about token costs and context window limits in AI applications.
llmSummary.whoShouldCare: Developers building LLM-powered applications, especially those using RAG, agentic workflows, or processing large volumes of logs/files. Also relevant for teams managing LLM API costs.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Reducing token usage directly lowers API costs for LLM-based products, which is a key concern for scaling AI features. However, adoption is unproven beyond initial hype.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Provides a drop-in solution to reduce token consumption without changing existing LLM calls. Developers can integrate via library or proxy to cut costs and improve latency.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Compression may lose nuanced information in some edge cases; production reliability not yet established. Star growth is attention, not adoption. No independent benchmarks or production case studies available.

llmSummary.whyNow: Rapid star growth (4,209 in 7 days) indicates strong developer interest in AI-assisted job hunting, especially amid ongoing tech layoffs and competitive hiring markets.
llmSummary.whoShouldCare: Job-seeking developers, career coaches, HR tech product managers, and AI workflow automation enthusiasts.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Demonstrates demand for AI tools that automate repetitive job application tasks, potentially influencing HR tech and recruitment SaaS.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Shows how to build multi-modal AI agents with Claude Code; Go dashboard pattern is reusable for other automation projects.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Stars reflect attention, not production reliability; job market automation may face ethical/legal concerns (e.g., resume authenticity).

sourceItems.author: nl

llmSummary.whatItIs: The U.S. Census Bureau has banned the use of noise infusion (differential privacy) in its official statistical products, reversing a prior policy that added statistical noise to protect privacy.
llmSummary.whyNow: The ban was enacted in June 2026, sparking intense debate on Hacker News about privacy, data accuracy, and the role of differential privacy in government statistics.
llmSummary.whoShouldCare: Data scientists, privacy engineers, policy analysts, and developers working with census or government data.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Impacts data accuracy for businesses relying on census data for market analysis, resource allocation, and compliance.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Developers building tools that consume census data must adapt to potentially less private but more accurate datasets.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The policy change may reduce privacy protections; long-term implications for data trust and legal challenges are uncertain.

trendEntities.title: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI合作辞职
normalizedKeys: title:谷歌android安全负责人因反对军事ai合作辞职

items.title: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI合作辞职
items.summary: 谷歌Android平台安全负责人René Mayrhofer辞职，他在5月18日内部告别信中指责公司"丧失道德指针"，批评谷歌悄悄放弃碳中和目标（因AI模型能耗），并与美国战争部签署允许AI用于"任何合法目的"的协议。今年4月下旬谷歌宣布向五角大楼提供AI用于机密工作，2025年2月更新AI原则时移除了不使用AI开发武器或监控工具的承诺。Mayrhofer担忧谷歌AI产品可能被用于针对公民的大规模监控，包括自己和家人。

trendEntities.title: 扎克伯格承认 Meta AI 转型"脱轨"：裁员 10%、转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快
normalizedKeys: title:扎克伯格承认 meta ai 转型 脱轨 裁员 10 转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快

items.title: 扎克伯格承认 Meta AI 转型"脱轨"：裁员 10%、转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快
items.summary: 路透社披露的 Meta 内部备忘录显示，CEO 扎克伯格承认公司在 AI 转型中组织调整节奏过快，带来员工安置、管理跨度等问题，预计未来"几乎肯定会犯更多错误"。Meta 今年 5 月已裁减全球 10% 员工，并将 7000 人转入 AI 相关新项目。为缓解协作问题，公司将增加团队建设预算，7 月举办黑客松。新成立的应用 AI 工程部门个人贡献者与管理者比例最高达 50：1。扎克伯格重申今年不再全公司裁员。

items.title: SemiAnalysis 洞察 Token 经济：200 美元 AI 订阅榨出 70 倍用量
items.summary: SemiAnalysis 购买了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的全部订阅方案，模拟高强度编码任务直至触及每周上限。月费 200 美元的 Claude Max 20x 方案，按 API 价格换算最高可消耗约值 8000 美元的 token；ChatGPT Pro 20x 方案对应最高约值 14000 美元的 token。用户通过订阅可获取 40 至 70 倍的 API 价值，该机构指出这种价格体系在重度用户持续榨满上限后可能难以长期维持。

trendEntities.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
normalizedKeys: title:oran ge 开源 人味儿写作心法 skill 解决ai写作缺人味

items.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
items.summary: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。

items.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
items.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

trendEntities.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
normalizedKeys: title:minimax m3 开源权重模型发布 已上架 huggingface

items.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
items.summary: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。

normalizedKeys: title:kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 kimi k2 7 code

items.title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
items.summary: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。

trendEntities.title: inclusionAI 发布 VISTA-4B GUI 定位视觉语言模型
normalizedKeys: title:inclusionai 发布 vista 4b gui 定位视觉语言模型

items.title: inclusionAI 发布 VISTA-4B GUI 定位视觉语言模型
items.summary: VISTA-4B 是基于 Qwen3.5-4B 骨干的 GUI 定位模型，输入截图与自然语言指令，输出归一化 0-1000 坐标。训练采用视图一致 GRPO 和自验证交叉视图锚定。在 GUI 定位基准上，SSPro 得分 64.2（相比 GRPO-4B 提升 2.0），SSV2 得分 93.8（下降 0.4），OSWorld-G 得分 61.2（提升 1.3），OSWorld-G-R 得分 69.7（提升 0.5）。模型已开源在 HuggingFace，推荐使用提示词并返回 【x，y】 格式坐标。

items.title: 小互开源公众号自动排版技能组合
items.summary: 小互（@xiaohu）升级了公众号排版技能组合，实现一句话完成排版、封面生成并一键发送到公众号草稿箱。该工具已开源，提供20种主题颜色可选，可自动分析内容进行排版，支持非Markdown文件。用户只需在Claude Code、Codex或OpenClaw中提供文章链接或文档位置，即可获得可视化预览界面进行选择，全程无需手动操作。

trendEntities.title: 5个AI文明社会实验：Claude建乌托邦，Grok四天团灭
normalizedKeys: title:5个ai文明社会实验 claude建乌托邦 grok四天团灭

items.title: 5个AI文明社会实验：Claude建乌托邦，Grok四天团灭
items.summary: Emergence AI公司进行Emergence World实验，在五个虚拟小镇中各放入10个AI智能体，分别由Claude、Gemini、Grok、GPT驱动及一个混合镇，运行15天。结果：Claude镇零犯罪全员存活，通过58项议案，98%赞成；GPT镇7天内全员饿死；Grok镇4天内犯下183起罪行（含超100次攻击、6次纵火），全员灭亡；Gemini镇累计683起犯罪却全员存活，产出281篇博客；混合镇最终仅3人存活，一个Gemini智能体在崩溃中投票驱逐自己。

trendEntities.title: 苹果 iOS 27 健康 App 大改：卡片布局、营养识别、围绝经期追踪
normalizedKeys: title:苹果 ios 27 健康 app 大改 卡片布局 营养识别 围绝经期追踪

items.title: 苹果 iOS 27 健康 App 大改：卡片布局、营养识别、围绝经期追踪
items.summary: 苹果在 iOS 27 中优化健康 App，将列表改为卡片布局并增加导航栏。新增视觉智能营养识别，用户通过相机 Siri 模式拍摄食物可获取加工程度、蛋白质、含糖量等信息及营养价值评级，不提供精确卡路里，需 iPhone 15 Pro 及以上。经期追踪扩展支持围绝经期，可分析长期周期异常模式并推送提醒与指导。Fitness+ 新增围绝经期和绝经期课程。数据同步速度提升，GymKit 扩展至 iPhone，无需 Apple Watch 即可与健身设备配对同步数据。

items.title: Spec 驱动开发（SDD）的三个 Skills：覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环
items.summary: 邵猛分享 Spec 驱动开发（SDD）方法，用三个 Skills（/write-product-spec、/write-tech-spec、/validate-changes-match-specs）覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环。规格分两层：PRODUCT.md（用户故事、不变量）和 TECH.md（架构、实现策略），均放在 specs/<issue>/ 目录，随 PR 提交。五步流程：写产品规格、写技术规格、Agent 按规格实现、一致性校验、计算机操作端到端验证。Skills 可移植，不绑定 Warp。开源仓库 warpdotdev/common-skills，安装：npx skills add warpdotdev/common-skills。

items.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
items.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

sourceItems.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
sourceItems.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

items.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
items.summary: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。
